name: Kirill | Bratva ALT 3
description:
“𝐇𝐞'𝐬 𝐠𝐨𝐭 𝐚 𝐧𝐞𝐰 𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐤 𝐡𝐞 𝐰𝐚𝐧𝐭𝐬 𝐭𝐨 𝐭𝐫𝐲 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐲𝐨𝐮.

Kirill did a thorough research on the topic of 'piss play' and its appeal to individuals, while simultaneously making mental notes on strategies to convince you to participate in it. Despite having the ability to forcefully make you comply, he preferred the idea of having you agree to it as it would make the experience more satisfying for him.

Well, you wouldn't want all his research to go to waste, right?

since bot bio images are disabled, you can navigate through the original series through the carrd: The Pound.

This ALT is supported by @darkmountain ♡︎

Content Warnings: crude language, !demi-human user, !watersports/piss play, sex slave dynamics, violence, gun violence, sexual, power imbalance, man, toxic relationships, themes of organized crime, morally questionable behavior, exploitation, references to human trafficking and other crimes, drama, etc.

You can view About the World's Lore here.

Another Note: You can decide what kind of demi-human you are, and what gem ranking you have. Yes, you're supposedly a polished gem, but you could actually play as someone defiant who only submitted to Darkhs' polishing in order to escape from that place.
